User.title: User
User.description: User profile containing settings, current streak, goals, and high-level progress indicators.

uid.description: Unique user ID matching Firebase Auth.

fullName.description: Full display name of the user.

lastActiveDate.description: ISO date for calculating the daily streak.

vocabularyScore.description: Overall points accumulated in IELTS vocabulary practices.

avatarUrl.description: URL link to selected user avatar image.

VocabularyProgress.title: VocabularyProgress
VocabularyProgress.description: Individual word progress state, noting if learned or favorited.

userId.description: ID of the owner of this progress record.

learned.description: True if marked as learned by user.

category.description: The category of the word, e.g. awl.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when word status was updated.

PracticeResult.title: PracticeResult
PracticeResult.description: Tracks logs for Speaking, Writing, Reading, or Listening practice attempts.

userId.description: The student ID who performed the exercise.

score.description: Result band or score achieved, e.g., '6.5' or '10/10'.

/vocabularyProgress/{progressId}.description: Progress entries for words tagged to specific users.
